use_cases: Displaying contextual information when users hover over UI elements
Providing help text and explanations for form inputs and buttons
Showing semantic feedback with color-coded tooltips (success, warning, error)
Customizing tooltip positioning and alignment for different layout needs
Adding timed delays to control tooltip appearance timing
ai_summary: A lightweight tooltip wrapper component built on react-tooltip with customizable positioning, alignment, and color types. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with semantic color variants and configurable appearance delays. Designed for contextual information display across desktop and mobile interfaces.
